personal.name: Jordan Lee
personal.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
personal.summary: Senior software engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications, mentoring cross-functional teams, and shipping high-impact products across frontend, backend, and cloud infrastructure.

bullets: Led architecture for a customer analytics platform used by 120K+ monthly active users.
Reduced page load times by 42% through code splitting, query optimization, and bundle audits.
Mentored 4 engineers and introduced testing standards that cut regression bugs by 30%.
Built reusable design system components adopted across 3 internal products.
Partnered with product and design to ship onboarding improvements that increased activation by 18%.
Implemented dashboards and reporting flows using React, TypeScript, and Chart.js.
Developed full-stack features for B2B SaaS clients using Node.js, PostgreSQL, and React.
Created internal tooling that reduced support turnaround time by 25%.
Collaborated with QA and customer success to prioritize and resolve production issues.

education.description: Focused on distributed systems, databases, and human-computer interaction.

projects.title: OpsSight Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time operations dashboard with alerting, anomaly detection, and executive-ready reporting views.

projects.title: Interview Prep Assistant
projects.description: AI-assisted coaching tool that generates mock interviews, tracks improvements, and summarizes strengths by role.
